lyrics.text: You're all just a bunch of spineless, tone-deaf hacks who can't even begin to grasp the concept of chaos. Your 'music' is nothing but noise pollution.
lyrics.author: singer

lyrics.text: This is a joke, right? You're all just pretending to make music while secretly pissing away the last shred of creativity.
lyrics.author: singer

lyrics.text: You're right, we'll see if anyone can grasp the concept of your double-kick. I guess my 'noise' is what you call music.
lyrics.author: bassist

lyrics.text: Then *scream with me*, you little lyric-worm!
lyrics.author: drummer

lyrics.text: Then *piss away with me*, you pretentious wrecking ball!
lyrics.author: drummer

lyrics.text: You're all just a bunch of spineless, tone-deaf hacks who can't even begin to grasp the concept of chaos. Your 'music' is nothing but noise pollution.
lyrics.author: singer
